name: Macromill, Inc.
summary: Macromill, Inc. provides marketing research services worldwide. It offers Neuro Research services to investigate and evaluate neural activity reactions, such as electroencephalograms that cannot be caught by questionnaires and interviews. It is also involved in the Internet research; offline research, such as focus group interview / depth interview, central location test, and home use test; digital marketing research, database research, self type research, medical research, and promotion √É¬ó research, as well as O2O promotion, sampling promotion, and web advertisement services. In addition, the company provides data analysis service; marketing and consulting services; and Movie Karte, a neuroresearch that measures the effectiveness of video advertisements using brain wave data. Macromill, Inc. was founded in 2000 and is headquartered in Tokyo, Japan.
